overall.description: A slow first-person walk along a futuristic elevated pedestrian walkway in a cyberpunk city, featuring large animated holographic billboards and multi-level urban infrastructure. The scene displays high-fidelity game engine graphics with prominent neon signage and detailed futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic elevated pedestrian walkway beneath transit infrastructure

events.description: holographic billboard advertisement cycles animation, text temporarily disappears

agents.ego_description: slowly walking along an elevated pedestrian walkway, passing a large animated digital billboard on the right

entered.detail: large digital advertisement display showing animated character with green glasses and 'BOTTOMS UP' text
overhead metal framework and rail system for elevated transportation
multi-level road infrastructure with moving traffic visible below the walkway
metallic safety barrier with green paint along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The camera moves slowly along a futuristic elevated pedestrian walkway beneath a massive transit structure. A large holographic billboard dominates the right side, displaying a cycling advertisement. Below to the left, an urban highway with sparse traffic is visible through green metal railings. The environment features cyberpunk architecture with mixed natural and neon lighting, and the billboard gradually recedes into the distance as the camera progresses forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic elevated walkway that gradually recedes from a dominant holographic display into the depths of a cyberpunk cityscape. It begins beneath a massive transit structure, gliding past a large, cycling holographic advertisement that illuminates the right side of the frame. As the camera progresses forward, the view opens to reveal an urban highway with sparse traffic visible through green metal railings on the left. The scene then shifts as the towering billboard slowly recedes into the distance, blending the mixed natural and neon lighting of the surrounding architecture into a cohesive urban vista.
